candidates.title: AI labs shift from model demos to enterprise workflow agents
candidates.factualSummary: A leading AI vendor framed its latest product update around task orchestration, tool use, and enterprise controls rather than raw benchmark gains.
candidates.editorialRationale: Tests whether agentic AI monetizes through workflow ownership instead of model novelty.

clusters.title: AI workflow moats move beyond raw model capability
clusters.thesisCandidate: La ventaja en IA se desplaza desde el modelo aislado hacia control de workflow, distribución, evaluación y confianza operativa.
clusters.sharedMechanism: Capability commoditization pushes value toward workflow ownership and trust infrastructure.
clusters.keyTension: Open models compress differentiation while enterprise buyers still demand reliability, auditability and procurement safety.
clusters.educationalRationale: Teaches how technical moats migrate when a base capability becomes more widely available.
concentrationNotes: AI concentration is intentional because the reusable moat lesson links product, trust and distribution.

clusters.title: Physical infrastructure becomes the hidden AI strategy layer
clusters.thesisCandidate: AI strategy is increasingly constrained by chips, power, capex discipline and deployment economics.
clusters.sharedMechanism: Scarce physical inputs create pricing power and force ROI discipline downstream.
clusters.keyTension: Demand for AI capacity keeps rising while investors scrutinize whether capex turns into durable cash flow.
clusters.educationalRationale: Teaches second-order effects between infrastructure bottlenecks and software business models.

clusters.title: Macro and regulation shape the trust boundary for AI adoption
clusters.thesisCandidate: AI adoption is not only a capability curve; it is filtered through rates, labor evidence, compliance and buyer risk tolerance.
clusters.sharedMechanism: External constraints change the payoff of technical adoption by altering cost of capital and acceptable risk.
clusters.keyTension: The automation narrative can outrun macro evidence and regulatory deployment constraints.
clusters.educationalRationale: Teaches why strategic judgment requires connecting technical signals to economic and institutional constraints.
